name: Sri Lankan Omelette
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Chop the onion, chilli and curry leaves.
3. Mix the chopped onion, chilli, curry leaves, salt, black pepper, and cornflour into the beaten eggs.
4. Heat the oil in a pan.
5. Pour half of the egg mixture into the hot oil.
6. Cook for a couple of minutes, then carefully turn over and cook the other side.
7. Make another omelette with the remaining mixture.
